metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4160
metadata.comment:
Rationale: "Cindr is mainly expressed at the presynapse"
In this study, they analyze the subcellular localization of Cindr transfecting the variant CindrGFP and enhancing the signal by staining with anti-GFP.

In Fig 1B, they demonstrate that Cindr appears enriched within the neuropil, colocalizating with the presynaptic marker Bruchpilot (nc82). This assay was carried out in adult brain, although the expression/localization of Cindr was observed also in larval state.

In Fig 1C, the authors show that Cindr is enriched within the synaptic terminal boutons at neuromuscular junctions, colocalizating with presynaptic markers but not with postsynaptic ones. For this assay, they used the larval peripheral nervous system.

In Fig 1D, Cindr presents a similar localization to other binding partners at the neuromuscular junction, like Synapsin or Synaptotagmin.

In Fig S1G, the use of anti-GFP antibody drives to clear staining of the variant Cindr-GFP, being demonstrated a notable localization of this protein at the presynapse of the neuromuscular junction at larval state.

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The paper shows colocalisation of cindr-GFP with presynaptic markers synapsin, synaptotagmin and not with postsynaptic marker DLG. Lack of data on membrane topology forms the basis for selecting the term "presynapse".. Experimental description: Mixed sexes of flies (approximately 50% male and 50% female) were used for all experiments, where possible. Flies were raised on molasses-based food at 25°C with constant darkness unless otherwise noted.
cindrCA06686 from (Buszczak et al., 2007), referred to hereafter as cindrGFP
